title: lepidium sativum subsp. spinescens
intro: Lepidium sativum subsp. spinescens, also known as the prickly cress, is a subspecies of the common pepperwort plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Lepidium sativum subsp. spinescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
